name: Royal Heritage Suite
shortDescription: Immerse yourself in heritage luxury. Hand-painted frescoes, high stone arches, and private marble balconies.
description: The Royal Heritage Suite blends traditional Rajasthani craftsmanship with modern boutique comforts. Adorned with hand-carved pillars, imperial screens, and velvet fabrics, this suite is designed to transport you to an era of elegance. A grand balcony opens onto the central palace courtyard, offering private high tea service.

name: Imperial Lakeview Suite
shortDescription: Floating above the water. Floor-to-ceiling glass screens with panoramic lakeside vistas and a private plunge pool.
description: Positioned right on the lakeside, the Imperial Lakeview Suite features panoramic views of Udaipur's floating temples. Complete with custom wood panels, a marble writing bureau, and a private glass-enclosed plunge pool, this suite represents the pinnacle of luxury, balancing heritage architecture with contemporary aesthetics.

name: Sanctuary Pool Villa
shortDescription: Your private estate. Independent garden villa with heated lap pool, dining pavilion, and dedicated chef.
description: An absolute sanctuary. The Sanctuary Pool Villa is a standalone private residence within the estate. Surrounded by Mughal-inspired fountains and private gardens, it features its own driveway, a 15-meter heated pool, a private library, and an expansive dining terrace where our chef curates custom menus.
